question: Wimbledon ATP: Alex de Minaur vs Flavio Cobolli
description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Alex de Minaur and Flavio Cobolli in the Wimbledon ATP, originally scheduled for July 6, 2026 at 6:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Alex de Minaur' if Alex de Minaur advances against Flavio Cobolli.

This market will resolve to 'Flavio Cobolli' if Flavio Cobolli advances against Alex de Minaur.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the ATP Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Alex de Minaur enters this Wimbledon encounter with stronger grass-court credentials, having advanced to the semifinals in 's-Hertogenbosch and posted solid results at Queen's Club earlier in the 2026 season. The Australian maintains a 2-0 head-to-head edge, though both prior meetings occurred on hard courts. Flavio Cobolli has secured back-to-back wins at the All England Club, including a four-set victory over James Duckworth, but carries a modest 10-9 career record on the surface after a deep French Open run on clay. De Minaur’s speed and return game align well with grass demands, while Cobolli’s baseline aggression and recent tour-level milestones add upset potential in what projects as a competitive third- or fourth-round matchup.
